name: 陆姝仪

appearance.distinguishing_features: 泪眼盈盈,柔弱倔强的神态

visual_reference: delicate Chinese beauty, pitiful expression, tearful eyes, soft features, simple hanfu dress, fragile appearance, innocent look with hidden depth
personality: 表面柔弱温婉,实则心机深沉,为达目的不择手段
desire: 嫁给沈词或找到好归宿,摆脱寄人篱下的命运
flaw: 过度依赖他人怜悯,手段下作
arc: 从受害者→施害者→自食恶果
scene_presence: 重要配角,关键冲突制造者
